Revenue.narrative: Revenue: 14.2 (exceeded target of 13.8). Trend is вҶ—пёҸ up with steady momentum. MoM: +12.7% (14.2 vs 12.6). YoY: +9.2% (14.2 vs 13.0).
Revenue.interpretation: Strong revenue performance with consistent growth momentum

CAC.narrative: CAC: 42.0 (beats target of 45.0). Trend is вҶҳпёҸ down with steady momentum. MoM: -12.5% (42.0 vs 48.0). YoY: +5.0% (42.0 vs 40.0).

Conversion.narrative: Conversion: 2.1 (misses target of 2.3). Trend is вҶҳпёҸ down with steady momentum. MoM: -4.5% (2.1 vs 2.2). YoY: +5.0% (2.1 vs 2.0).
Conversion.interpretation: Conversion rate decline requires investigation and action

recommendations.rationale: Current momentum is strong with +12.7% MoM growth and +9.2% YoY. Continue current strategies and explore expansion opportunities.
action_items: Increase marketing investment where ROI is proven

recommendations.rationale: While beating target, CAC improvement of -12.5% MoM and beats target by 6.7% needs understanding. Ensure quality of acquired customers.
action_items: Analyze customer acquisition channels for efficiency drivers
Verify customer quality and LTV metrics
Document and scale successful acquisition tactics

recommendations.recommendation: Explore if Conversion outperformance is sustainable
recommendations.rationale: Conversion rate is down 4.5% MoM and misses target by 8.7%, but still up 5% YoY. Need to identify root causes and recovery plan.
action_items: Deep-dive analysis of conversion rate drop
Identify changes in funnel that caused decline

summaries.executive: Q1 shows mixed performance: Revenue exceeds target at +2.9% vs target, but Conversion rate misses by -8.7%. CAC improvements of -6.7% indicate efficiency gains. Key actions: accelerate revenue, address conversion decline, verify CAC sustainability.
